purpose: Executable governance registry for remaining Zhao-Cui filtering completion after P45/P46, excluding S&P 500 real-data reproduction.
m1_route_decision_source: P46 bounded multistate fixed-design TT adapter passed; no adaptive MATLAB TT-cross/SIRT reproduction evidence exists.

generalized_sv_lower_rung.allowed_claim: lower-rung API/HMC diagnostics for generalized SV only

spatial_sir_lower_rung.allowed_claim: lower-rung API/HMC diagnostics for spatial SIR only

spatial_sir_production.allowed_claim: production API/HMC diagnostics for spatial SIR

predator_prey_lower_rung.allowed_claim: lower-rung API/HMC diagnostics for predator-prey only

rows.target_identity: Route-label decision for later Zhao-Cui rows; not a matched-target filtering reproduction claim.
rows.reference_route: P30 equations and audited MATLAB behavior as reference material only.
rows.zhao_cui_route: Either clean-room adaptive route candidate or documented-deviation fixed-design substitute.
nonclaims: adaptive route candidate is not adaptive MATLAB TT-cross/SIRT reproduction
no filtering correctness claim
no HMC readiness

rows.target_identity: Synthetic or model-suite paper-scale readiness manifest, explicitly excluding S&P 500 real-data reproduction.
rows.state_law: Declared by each eligible downstream model row.
rows.observation_law: Declared by each eligible downstream model row.
rows.parameterization: Declared by each eligible downstream model row.
rows.reference_route: Lower-rung exact, dense/refined, Kalman, or reviewed closure guardrail required before a candidate row is eligible.
rows.cut4_route: Only if the downstream target is declared compatible with CUT4 assumptions.
rows.zhao_cui_route: Documented-deviation fixed-design substitute; must carry M1 route label and branch policy.
nonclaims: no S&P 500 reproduction
finite paper-scale output is not correctness
no production filtering claim

rows.target_identity: Declared generalized SV target: native, transformed exact, KSC mixture, or separately reviewed approximation.
rows.state_law: Declared by the M3 target note; native two-state rows require s_t and h_t laws.
rows.observation_law: Declared by the M3 target note with Jacobian terms for transformed targets.
rows.parameterization: Same unconstrained parameterization across CUT4, Zhao-Cui, and reference routes.
rows.reference_route: Exact, dense/refined, Kalman, or separately reviewed generalized-SV reference route.
rows.cut4_route: Authorized only when the declared target is compatible with CUT4 assumptions.
rows.zhao_cui_route: Documented-deviation fixed-design substitute using the P46/P47 retained-grid route with M1 route label and fixed branch policy.
nonclaims: no native generalized-SV claim from transformed diagnostic alone
no HMC readiness from value agreement alone
no S&P 500 reproduction

rows.target_identity: Declared spatial SIR target, usually additive-Gaussian closure unless a native route is separately reviewed.
rows.state_law: Small-J SIR transition and domain policy declared in M4.
rows.observation_law: Declared observation law; infectious-coordinate Gaussian closure if using CUT4.
rows.parameterization: Same unconstrained parameterization across reference, CUT4, and Zhao-Cui routes.
rows.reference_route: Small-J dense/refined reference with observed and unobserved state accuracy.
rows.cut4_route: Only on declared additive-Gaussian closure target.
rows.zhao_cui_route: Documented-deviation fixed-design substitute using the P46/P47 multistate retained-grid route with M1 route label.
nonclaims: lower-rung equality is not production filtering
closure likelihood is not native SIR correctness
no S&P 500 reproduction

rows.target_identity: Production- or near-paper-scale spatial SIR filtering row preserving the declared M4 target.
rows.state_law: Same target family as the passed M4a row, with production-scale dimensions and resource caps.
rows.observation_law: Same target family as the passed M4a row.
rows.parameterization: Same parameterization and route label as the lower-rung row unless a reviewed amendment changes it.
rows.reference_route: M4a lower-rung reference/equality gate plus production guardrails.
rows.cut4_route: Optional and only if the production target remains CUT4-compatible.
rows.zhao_cui_route: Documented-deviation fixed-design substitute using a production or near-paper-scale retained-grid route with M1 route label.
nonclaims: finite production manifest alone is not correctness
production token requires a production or near-paper-scale row
no native SIR claim unless native target is separately reviewed

rows.target_identity: Declared predator-prey target, usually additive-Gaussian RK closure unless a native route is separately reviewed.
rows.state_law: Small dense/refined predator-prey transition and domain policy declared in M5.
rows.observation_law: Declared observation law, with additive-Gaussian closure if using CUT4.
rows.parameterization: Same unconstrained parameterization across reference, CUT4, and Zhao-Cui routes.
rows.reference_route: Small dense/refined reference with downstream filtering value/state-quality metrics.
rows.cut4_route: Only on declared additive-Gaussian closure target.
rows.zhao_cui_route: Documented-deviation fixed-design substitute using the P46/P47 multistate retained-grid route with M1 route label.
nonclaims: proposal/preconditioner metrics alone are explanatory
lower-rung filtering is not production filtering
no native predator-prey claim unless native target is separately reviewed

rows.target_identity: Production- or near-paper-scale predator-prey filtering row preserving the declared M5 target.
rows.state_law: Same target family as the passed M5a row, with production-scale dimensions and resource caps.
rows.observation_law: Same target family as the passed M5a row.
rows.parameterization: Same parameterization and route label as the lower-rung row unless a reviewed amendment changes it.
rows.reference_route: M5a lower-rung reference-filtering gate plus production guardrails.
rows.cut4_route: Optional and only if the production target remains CUT4-compatible.
rows.zhao_cui_route: Documented-deviation fixed-design substitute using a production or near-paper-scale retained-grid route with M1 route label.
nonclaims: finite production manifest alone is not correctness
production token requires a production or near-paper-scale row
no native predator-prey claim unless native target is separately reviewed

rows.target_identity: Stable score API and HMC-readiness table, labeled lower-rung or production for each target row.
rows.state_law: Inherited from each promoted target row.
rows.observation_law: Inherited from each promoted target row.
rows.parameterization: Same unconstrained parameterization as the corresponding value/gradient or filtering-quality row.
rows.reference_route: P42 Tier 1/2/3 checks for each promoted target.
rows.cut4_route: Only if the target's upstream row used a same-target CUT4 route.
rows.zhao_cui_route: Documented-deviation fixed-design substitute using a frozen-branch retained-grid route with M1 label and deterministic replay.
nonclaims: API pass is separate from HMC readiness
lower-rung tokens support only lower-rung API/HMC diagnostics
production API/HMC readiness requires corresponding production filtering token
